prompt: Write the opening paragraph of a children's book about a shy octopus who wants to make friends.
response:
Here's an opening paragraph:

In the deepest, bluest part of Coral Reef Valley, there lived an octopus named Oliver who was the shyest creature in all the ocean. While other sea creatures swam and played together, Oliver would curl up his eight tentacles and hide behind giant purple sea fans, watching from a distance. He desperately wanted to make friends, but every time another fish or crab or seahorse came near, he would quickly change color—blending into the rocks and coral, hoping no one would notice him.
